creator: gehaowu@bitmoe.com
text:
Dear FreeBSD Project Team,
I am writing to request the creation of a new mailing list, freebsd-loongarch, for the development, coordination, and support of FreeBSD on the LoongArch architecture.
LoongArch is a newly developed independent instruction set architecture (ISA) designed by Loongson Technology in China. It is similar to the RISC-V architecture.
Currently, mainstream open-source software is already supported, such as llvm, gcc, rust, kde, gnome, libreoffice, qemu, etc. (the compilation success rate of debian-ports software packages has reached about 96%).
Other reference materials:
https://github.com/loongson
https://www.loongson.cn/product/show?id=26
https://buildd.debian.org/stats/
Thank you for considering our request. We look forward to your positive response and to contributing to the FreeBSD community.
Thanks & Best Regards
